violations.text: A scrubby sponge was observed in the hand-washing sink located in seafood/meat department. PIC relocated scrubby sponge to wash bay of 3-bay sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (fan covers) have an accumulation of dust, and other debris located in meat room and produce walk-in cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
Mop was observed stored in stagnant water of mop bucket. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The ceiling in the (produce) area is in poor repair. Observed 3 ceiling tiles missing located in produce back room. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

Thermometers are lacking in several refrigeration units throughout the establishment. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024

The rolling gate to the outside, located in the loading dock area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Single service items in the bakery area are not being stored properly in their original protective package. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in several walk-in coolers have an accumulation of dust and biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in poor repair: 1) The bottom area of a wall in the back meat department is in poor repair 2) The seal of the ceiling panels in the seafood and back area walk-in coolers/freezer were exposing porous wood New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
